name: Kaldo Gehenna
description: __Height:__ 175cm Kaldo Gehenna is a Divine Visionary and Head of the Magic Talent Administration, a subdivision of the Bureau of Magic.

name: Kotoha Isone
description: A sixteen-year-old high school student who was once a human before she was possessed by a youkai at a very young age. Because of that event, she became a Hanyou, half youkai, and half-human. She is a Language-user (Kotodama tsukai) who can summon things when she emphasizes words. She can conjure up weapons or objects by saying one word, however, there are certain objects where she needs to use a lengthy spell in order to conjure them up. She is also a gun nut. name: Kouji Minamoto
description: Koji Minamoto is a main character in the Digimon anime series "Digimon Frontier". In this series, a group of chosen human children were given the ability to turn into digimon. Koji was the child chosen to wield the Spirit of Light. Koji starts the series as the group loner - a kid who wanted friends, but never had the chance to make any because he had to change schools too many times. name: Kumi Kawamura
description: The most independent member of the Alien Party, and a 6th-grade student. She has been a member of the Student Council for years and has assisted her widowed mother in her writing activities as well as an above average number of chores for a student her age.

name: Kurumi Saijou
description: ~!Kurumi Saijo emerges from Ai's first Wonder Egg.!~ Kurumi is an empathetic girl. She sometimes speaks to others in an authoritative manner, but is a helpful person. She is very sarcastic in serious situations. ~!Kurumi was a student who had no real friends, only the superficial kind with whom you exchange empty phrases. Her Wonder Killer was an unknown schoolgirl with axes who endlessly laughed at her.!~ (Source: Wonder Egg Priority Fandom Wiki)

name: Lag Seeing
description: The main protagonist in Letter Bee. He is a young boy with a very focused mindset, regardless of what situations he gets into and always focuses on delivering the package. He has a special gun called the Shin Ganjuu, literally the "heart bullet gun" where he loads a "fragment of heart" into the gun, then fires it at the target. name: Masa
description: A member of the Seto Group. Masa is the one who stole Nagasumi's first kiss (he was actually performing CPR, but anyone would use that as an excuse to say they got a kiss from a man as beautiful as him). Nagasumi's mother and father are very attracted to Masa, but he often shoots their love down for he only loves his close friend Mark. He also transfers to Nagasumi's school, becoming his math teacher. He is often seen with his close friend Mark who he is often compared to in terms of beauty.

He wears a dark suit with a concentric circle motif, lacking the right sleeve and a large part of the right side. name: Reiji Amamiya
description: Reiji Amamiya is an AMO Kanto Branch Special Riot Police supervisor. He knows Akira's father.

name: Retoree
description: __Height:__ 150 cm __Group:__ Plasmagica __Position:__ Vocals and Bass A girl from the Dog Tribe who is a total internet otaku and smartphone addict. She usually puts on a cool facade, but deep down, she is incredibly shy. Whenever a topic she’s passionate about comes up, she gets so excited that she starts talking a mile a minute. Online, however, she’s quite the barker. She has an aversion to "normies" (people with active social lives) and clothing store clerks.

name: Shiro Amada
description: Shiro is a young soldier that has been chosen to be the leader of the 08th MS team. Eventually Shiro learns that Earth combat is much different from Space combat, and he slowly loses trust from his team as he falls in love with a Zeon Pilot, Aina Sahalin.
